stemHtml: When in the WX+T mode, what is the airborne weather radar able to detect?

options.a: Clear air turbulence at cruising altitude by using Doppler techniques with an increased PRF (Pulse Repetition Frequency).
options.b: Turbulent clouds by looking for ice crystals in the upper part of a thunderstorm at a reduced wavelength.
options.c: Thunderstorms with strong updraft and downdraft by measuring static emitted from lightning.
options.d: Turbulence by looking for a frequency shift in combination with pulse flattening.
